name: Sukko Sambhar
intro: Sukko sambhar means to me what togarashi means to a Japanese. It’s that one dry spice mix that has to be frequently replenished in my kitchen. Sprinkle it on dal-rice or on a slice of toasted sourdough or use it to spice up salad dressings—it can be used in multiple ways and is delicious every single time.
method: In a blender, blend the split mustard seeds into a fine powder. Transfer to a bowl and add all the remaining ingredients except the mustard oil.
Warm the mustard oil and pour a spoonful at a time into the dry mixture. Mix well.
